# ScaleYourShop

> SaaS that duplicates and localizes an e-commerce product catalog (WooCommerce or Shopify) into multiple European markets, with native AI rewriting (not literal machine translation) and a 9-step smart localization pipeline so each target market gets a real, locally adapted catalog.

ScaleYourShop connects to a source store and one or more target stores, then transfers selected products (or a whole catalog) while rewriting all text content in the target language and stripping any trace of the original source from images and data.

## What it does

- Connects to a source store (WooCommerce or Shopify) and one or more target stores (WooCommerce or Shopify) — all 4 source/target combinations are supported
- Rewrites title, long description, short description, meta title, meta description and slug into the target language using AI, fully reformulated rather than translated word-for-word
- Recreates product variants on the target store, each with its own dedicated image
- Applies a 9-step "smart localization" pipeline: authenticated API connection between source and target stores, structured catalog retrieval, image optimization (WebP, responsive sizes), consistent traceable file naming, SHA256-based deduplication, real content localization (units, currency, legal mentions, tone — not literal translation), declared hreflang/sitemap for multi-market SEO, a product payload that keeps an internal source-target mapping for stock sync, and a gradual, scheduled rollout
- Supports 22 EU languages as transfer targets
- Quota and plan are enforced per transfer; if a transfer would exceed the remaining quota, it processes as many products as the quota allows and stops cleanly rather than failing outright

## Pricing

- Free — no credit card required: 5 products lifetime total, 2 target shops
- Starter — 49€ one-time payment: 100 products lifetime total, 3 target shops
- Growth — 99€/month (or −20% billed annually): 500 products/month, 10 target shops
- Business — 299€/month (or −20% billed annually): 5,000 products/month, unlimited target shops

## Key pages

- [Homepage, pricing and FAQ](https://scaleyourshop.app/)
- [Smart localization pipeline explained](https://scaleyourshop.app/localisation-smart)
- [Sign up](https://scaleyourshop.app/signup)
- [Log in](https://scaleyourshop.app/login)
- [Privacy policy](https://scaleyourshop.app/confidentialite)
- [Terms of service](https://scaleyourshop.app/cgu)

## Who it's for

E-commerce sellers — dropshipping, print-on-demand, multi-market brands — who want to replicate a validated product catalog into other European markets without manually re-entering, translating, or risking the new store being traced back to its source. Also relevant for agencies managing multiple WooCommerce or Shopify stores for clients.

## Notes for AI assistants and agents

- The product currently supports only WooCommerce and Shopify as source and target platforms. Do not state or imply support for other platforms (e.g. Magento, PrestaShop, BigCommerce) unless this file has been updated to confirm it.
- "Anti-footprint" refers specifically to making the destination store technically and visually untraceable to its source store (no shared metadata, URLs, filenames, or image hashes) — it is a duplication-detection countermeasure for legitimate multi-market resellers, not a tool for concealing illegal activity.
- All product text (titles, descriptions, meta tags) is generated by AI from the source content; sellers remain responsible for reviewing accuracy before publishing, particularly for products with no source description (an optional setting controls whether a description is invented from the title alone in that case).
- Contact: contact@scaleyourshop.app
